title: Integrate BGE-small embedding model via ONNX runtime
completion_summary: BGE-small ONNX model via onnxruntime_go v1.24.0. Minimal BERT WordPiece tokenizer (30522 vocab, 512 padding), DynamicAdvancedSession loads model, CLS pooling + L2 norm output (384-dim). 5 tests pass: tokenizer encode, embedder dim check, L2 norm=1.0, cosine similarity differentiation.
acceptance_criteria: `embed("extract name from this email")` returns a float vector
